objects.prompt: "Pixel art sprite sheet, 48x48 per item, strict top-down orthographic view, 90-degree camera angle looking straight down. Collection of urban street props: a park bench, a trash can, a streetlight pole, a mailbox, and a utility box. Cyberpunk Tokyo and NYC aesthetic. Flat design, no isometric angles, no side faces, no perspective depth, clean lines, isolated on white background."
